TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Mara ono finaweran tapang Taywan ŤáļÁĀ£śįĎšłĽŚĆĖ == Odemak no finaweran ato akat no Taywan:śįĎšłĽŚĆĖťĀéÁ®č Masamaanay kodemak ato akat to pakaylaay to kala o finaweran tapang Taywan sanay a demak , olanan a demak ato lakat nila i pakaylaay to faloco' no polong finawloan ato sakapolongan a demak, naitini i 'ayaw no 1990 a mihecaan a misalingato, nano 'ayaw nila i, ya o Ciwkoku Komingtang ho kocitodongay i, caayay ho ko o nihay a kanatal ko Taywan sanay, nikaolira, odemak to hatiniay i, iraay ko todongay a lakat ato demak nira a pala o nihay to a kanatal ko Taywan sanay, pakayni tora pitool to pala o niya to koninian a kanatal sanay a demak ato tayal i, caay kao lahodayay, ano caay pakayni i no sakapolongan ato polong no finawelan a sakalacicay no faloco' i, caay ka tangsol saan a malaheci ko hatiniay a demak, nawhani nano 'ayaw no mihecaheca:an, itini i sakalaylay no likisi no Taywan, caay ka awaay ko hatiniay a demak to pakaylaay to saka ono niya to a kanatal sanay a demak, nano itini i 1949 a mihecaan ami salingato, tahila i paheleken no Conghamingko a malalid a milikec to kanatal i, dodosato ilaay to a masadak ko lomaloma a sa'opo to citodongay a milikec to finaworan a sa'opo. I'ayaway a demak:ť¶ĖŤ¶Āś≠∑Á®č Ano 'alawen nano 'ayaw to 1895 a mihecaan ko demak ato fodfod to pakaylaay i Taywan i, caay ka^ca iraay to ko sapipalowadaw to saka lakanatalaw no Taywan, nanay malao niyah finaweran tapang to a kanatal ko Taywan sanay a longoc, nikaolira, caayay ka laheci, nawhani caayay ho ka songira' ama lacicay ko nafaloco'an no polong no finaworan, ano so'linen a somowal i, o longoc to pakaylaay to sakala kanatalaw no Taywan i, alatek o sa'ayaway a misalingato i, naitilaayho i 1910 a mihecaan to ikadipongan ho ami salingato tora Taceng hananay, o longoc no finaweran itiya i, nanay mikilecad to Dipong a mikihatiya ami likec to kanatal o sanay, ato pipalowad to sapilikec to kanatal a sa'opo, nikaolira caayay ka pihai kola Dipong , ano hatilatila caay ka pitolas ami longoc to saka lacecayaw amidemak to sa'opo to tayal topakaylaay i polong finaworan, tangasa sato 1935 a mihecaan, iraay to ko sa'ayaway a pisasingkiw hananay a demak. Dodosato ilato koya holam a tayni i Taywan, tola Congwhamingko hananay tamdaw ami likec to hekal, hato ilato ko kanga'ay ami kihatiya ama tayal to sa'opo, nikaolira caay ka matiya to ononiya to a kanatal sanay demak, sanaw likol sato ilahaca kola sakalowlow no hekal tola 228 hananay a demakan, likol sato tadacaay sato koka pilikec nangal to hekal, sanaw adihay sato koka lalawlaw no hekal, ora Racen a lawlaw , Congli a lawlaw , Cawto a lawlaw , Militaw a lawlaw , ato ola tangway hananay a demmak no hekal, likor sato iraay to ko pipaca'of no safo to longoc no finaworan, tangasa to i 1990 a mihecaan itiya sato a dodosanay a o niyah finaweran tapang to a kanatal sanay a longoc, itiyaay to a so'lin a caay to ka o^dengan to cecayay a tang aca komi likecay to hekkal, iraay to koloma a sa'opo ami kihatiya ami likec to hekal kanatal. O sakahatini no Taywan a o niyah finaweran tapng to ko citodongay a kanatal sanay a faloco ato demak i, o tadamaanay a tayal tosapilikec to hekal ato kanatal, o naitiniay i 1990 a mihecaan ami salingato tangasa i 2000 a mihecaan, o ninian i o tatangangay a longoc to saka laheci no demak i tini i Taywan, pakayniay toya 10 a mihecaan a misafilofilo, sanaw itiya a misalingato ami laheci to singkiw to a palowad to Lipo koing ato Kota taypiaw hananay, nga'ayay to ami palowad to teked a sa'po tora tang hananay ato pasadak to masamaamaanay a singpon, ato misalof to sapilikec to kanatal, ato pasadak tono kanatalay a singkiw, ono niyalo'ay a singkiw, ato tomok citodongay no Taywan, lomasato to sakakotaykotay ami likec to kanatal, ato pasadak to naitiniay i faloco' to tayal tosapi dipot to siyakay, ano o masamaamaanay to a tayal tosapalowad to siyakay i, nga'ayay to ami pahadak, saheto o damesayay onano nai foloco'ay a demak, sanaw oninian a demak i, mapahapinangay to itini i polong no kanatanatal, matoya sowal no singpon topi pasadak i kalokanatal i 2021 a mihecaan, o Taywan i o sakafalo to a ono niya to a kanatal sanay a sowal, mikikaka haca to 'ayaway a kanatal koka laheci to malo todongay a tada so'linay to a kanatal ko Taywan, miki'ayaw haca to i 'aya'ayaway to padaka a kanatal. O likisi no Taywan.ŚŹįÁĀ£ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Ono niyah finaweran tapang to ko Taywan.śįĎšłĽŚĆĖÁöĄŚŹįÁĀ£ Naitiniho i kaholaman, olanan a o ninah finaweran tapang kako kanatal sanay a halateng, naitini i tono padakaan ama pacomod to tani i Taywan, toya tala'ayaw no fodfod to 1895 a mihecaan, itini i Taywan 'aloman ko cifaloco'ay o mafana'ay a tamdaw to pakaylaay i o niyah finaweran tapang to kako kanatal Taywan sanay, I'ayaway to a mapalowad ko hatiniay a halateng ato faloco', o sakahatila nila i, pakaylaay to nano piihan nangla to pikowan no Dipong , itini i o niyah finaweran tapang to kako kanatal sanay a longoc ato faloco', o todongay to o pipalowad to kanatal no Taywan, o matayalay no siefo a tamdaw i o hatilaay to o nano misingkiwan ama tayal, itini a mapahapinang, nano 'ayaw ilaayto a lomengaw ko hatiniay a faloco' ato halateng tosaka palowadaw to o niyah finaweran tapang to a kanatal yasanay a demak, mikihatiyaay toya I'ayaway a Congwhamingkow i 16 amihecaan a lomuwad, sanaw ilaay a mapahapinang i ci^tangay to tilid ato sapakafana' a codad to "sa'ayaway to o niyah finaweran tapang to kako kanatal sanay itini i Yasiya " haiito caay ka awa ko hatiniay a faloco' ato halateng no i Yasiyaay a kanatal to sapipalowadaw to o niyah finaweran tapang to a kanatal sanay a napinapi:na a palowad, nikaolira o itiniay i Taywanay a cifaloco'ay a tamdaw ami palowad i, ilaay to ami sa'icel, dengan sa caay ka laheci.(Siwkolan 'Amis/Pangcah Suman 05/08'25) O tahapinangan a tilidŚŹÉŤÄÉŤ≥áśĖô:

tajwan, pakajniaj to~uja ** a mińß…ô ¶aan a misafi…ĺo~ufi…ĺo~u, sanaw itija a misa…ĺiŇčato~u ami …ĺańß…ô ¶i to~u siŇčkiw to~u a pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u …ĺipo~u ko~uiŇč ato~u ko~uta tajpiaw ńßananaj, Ňča °ajaj to~u ami pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u t…ôk…ô…¨~…ģ a sa °po~u to~ura taŇč ńßananaj ato~u pasa…¨~…ģak to~u masamaamaanaj a siŇčpo~un, ato~u misa…ĺo~uf to~u sapi…ĺik…ô ¶ to~u kanata…ĺ, ato~u pasa…¨~…ģak to~uno~u kanata…ĺaj a siŇčkiw, o~uno~u nija…ĺo~u °aj a siŇčkiw, ato~u to~umo~uk ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj no~u tajwan, …ĺo~umasato~u to~u sakako~utajko~utaj ami …ĺik…ô ¶ to~u kanata…ĺ, ato~u pasa…¨~…ģak to~u naitiniaj i fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° to~u taja…ĺ to~usapi …¨~…ģipo~ut to~u sijakaj, ano~u o~u masamaamaanaj to~u a taja…ĺ to~usapa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u sijakaj i, Ňča °ajaj to~u ami pańßa…¨~…ģak, sańß…ôto~u o~u …¨~…ģam…ôsajaj o~unano~u nai fo~u…ĺo~u ¶o~u °aj a …¨~…ģ…ômak, sanaw o~uninian a …¨~…ģ…ômak i, mapańßapinaŇčaj to~u itini i po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u kanatanata…ĺ, mato~uja so~uwa…ĺ no~u siŇčpo~un to~upi pasa…¨~…ģak i ka…ĺo~ukanata…ĺ i **** a mińß…ô ¶aan, o~u tajwan i o~u sakafa…ĺo~u to~u a o~uno~u nija to~u a kanata…ĺ sanaj a so~uwa…ĺ, mikikaka ńßa ¶a to~u °ajawaj a kanata…ĺ ko~uka …ĺańß…ô ¶i to~u ma…ĺo~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj a ta…¨~…ģa so~u °…ĺinaj to~u a kanata…ĺ ko~u tajwan, miki °ajaw ńßa ¶a to~u i °aja °ajawaj to~u pa…¨~…ģaka a kanata…ĺ. o~u …ĺikisi no~u tajwan.**** o~uno~u nijańß finaw…ôran tapaŇč to~u ko~u tajwan.****** naitinińßo~u i kańßo~u…ĺaman, o~u…ĺanan a o~u ninańß finaw…ôran tapaŇč kako~u kanata…ĺ sanaj a ńßa…ĺat…ôŇč, naitini i to~uno~u pa…¨~…ģakaan ama pa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ to~u tani i tajwan, to~uja ta…ĺa °ajaw no~u fo~u…¨~…ģfo~u…¨~…ģ to~u **** a mińß…ô ¶aan, itini i tajwan °a…ĺo~uman ko~u ¶ifa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °aj o~u mafana °aj a tam…¨~…ģaw to~u pakaj…ĺaaj i o~u nijańß finaw…ôran tapaŇč to~u kako~u kanata…ĺ tajwan sanaj, i °ajawaj to~u a mapa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ ko~u ńßatiniaj a ńßa…ĺat…ôŇč ato~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °, o~u sakańßati…ĺa ni…ĺa i, pakaj…ĺaaj to~u nano~u piińßan naŇč…ĺa to~u piko~uwan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč , itini i o~u nijańß finaw…ôran tapaŇč to~u kako~u kanata…ĺ sanaj a …ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ ato~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °, o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u o~u pipa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u kanata…ĺ no~u tajwan, o~u mataja…ĺaj no~u si…ôfo~u a tam…¨~…ģaw i o~u ńßati…ĺaaj to~u o~u nano~u misiŇčkiwan ama taja…ĺ, itini a mapańßapinaŇč, nano~u °ajaw i…ĺaajto~u a …ĺo~um…ôŇčaw ko~u ńßatiniaj a fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ato~u ńßa…ĺat…ôŇč to~usaka pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģaw to~u o~u nijańß finaw…ôran tapaŇč to~u a kanata…ĺ jasanaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak, mikińßatijaaj to~uja i °ajawaj a ¶o~uŇčwńßamiŇčko~uw i ** amińß…ô ¶aan a …ĺo~umo~u~uwa…¨~…ģ, sanaw i…ĺaaj a mapańßapinaŇč i ¶i ĒtaŇčaj to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ ato~u sapakafana ° a ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ to~u "sa °ajawaj to~u o~u nijańß finaw…ôran tapaŇč to~u kako~u kanata…ĺ sanaj itini i jasija " ńßaiito~u ¶aaj ka awa ko~u ńßatiniaj a fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ato~u ńßa…ĺat…ôŇč no~u i jasijaaj a kanata…ĺ to~u sapipa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģaw to~u o~u nijańß finaw…ôran tapaŇč to~u a kanata…ĺ sanaj a napinapi:na a pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ, nikao~u…ĺira o~u itiniaj i tajwanaj a ¶ifa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °aj a tam…¨~…ģaw ami pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ i, i…ĺaaj to~u ami sa °i ¶…ô…ĺ, …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan sa ¶aaj ka …ĺańß…ô ¶i.(siwko~u…ĺan °amis/paŇč ¶ańß so~u~uman **/** °**) o~u tańßapinaŇčan a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ****:
S.FORM: == Mara ono finaweran tapang Taywan ŤáļÁĀ£śįĎšłĽŚĆĖ == Odemak no finaweran ato akat no Taywan:śįĎšłĽŚĆĖťĀéÁ®č Masamaanay kodemak ato akat to pakaylaay to kala o finaweran tapang Taywan sanay a demak , olanan a demak ato lakat nila i pakaylaay to faloco' no polong finawloan ato sakapolongan a demak, naitini i 'ayaw no 1990 a mihecaan a misalingato, nano 'ayaw nila i, ya o Ciwkoku Komingtang ho kocitodongay i, caayay ho ko o nihay a kanatal ko Taywan sanay, nikaolira, odemak to hatiniay i, iraay ko todongay a lakat ato demak nira a pala o nihay to a kanatal ko Taywan sanay, pakayni tora pitool to pala o niya to koninian a kanatal sanay a demak ato tayal i, caay kao lahodayay, ano caay pakayni i no sakapolongan ato polong no finawelan a sakalacicay no faloco' i, caay ka tangsol saan a malaheci ko hatiniay a demak, nawhani nano 'ayaw no mihecaheca:an, itini i sakalaylay no likisi no Taywan, caay ka awaay ko hatiniay a demak to pakaylaay to saka ono niya to a kanatal sanay a demak, nano itini i 1949 a mihecaan ami salingato, tahila i paheleken no Conghamingko a malalid a milikec to kanatal i, dodosato ilaay to a masadak ko lomaloma a sa'opo to citodongay a milikec to finaworan a sa'opo. I'ayaway a demak:ť¶ĖŤ¶Āś≠∑Á®č Ano 'alawen nano 'ayaw to 1895 a mihecaan ko demak ato fodfod to pakaylaay i Taywan i, caay ka^ca iraay to ko sapipalowadaw to saka lakanatalaw no Taywan, nanay malao niyah finaweran tapang to a kanatal ko Taywan sanay a longoc, nikaolira, caayay ka laheci, nawhani caayay ho ka songira' ama lacicay ko nafaloco'an no polong no finaworan, ano so'linen a somowal i, o longoc to pakaylaay to sakala kanatalaw no Taywan i, alatek o sa'ayaway a misalingato i, naitilaayho i 1910 a mihecaan to ikadipongan ho ami salingato tora Taceng hananay, o longoc no finaweran itiya i, nanay mikilecad to Dipong a mikihatiya ami likec to kanatal o sanay, ato pipalowad to sapilikec to kanatal a sa'opo, nikaolira caayay ka pihai kola Dipong , ano hatilatila caay ka pitolas ami longoc to saka lacecayaw amidemak to sa'opo to tayal topakaylaay i polong finaworan, tangasa sato 1935 a mihecaan, iraay to ko sa'ayaway a pisasingkiw hananay a demak. Dodosato ilato koya holam a tayni i Taywan, tola Congwhamingko hananay tamdaw ami likec to hekal, hato ilato ko kanga'ay ami kihatiya ama tayal to sa'opo, nikaolira caay ka matiya to ononiya to a kanatal sanay demak, sanaw likol sato ilahaca kola sakalowlow no hekal tola 228 hananay a demakan, likol sato tadacaay sato koka pilikec nangal to hekal, sanaw adihay sato koka lalawlaw no hekal, ora Racen a lawlaw , Congli a lawlaw , Cawto a lawlaw , Militaw a lawlaw , ato ola tangway hananay a demmak no hekal, likor sato iraay to ko pipaca'of no safo to longoc no finaworan, tangasa to i 1990 a mihecaan itiya sato a dodosanay a o niyah finaweran tapang to a kanatal sanay a longoc, itiyaay to a so'lin a caay to ka o^dengan to cecayay a tang aca komi likecay to hekkal, iraay to koloma a sa'opo ami kihatiya ami likec to hekal kanatal. O sakahatini no Taywan a o niyah finaweran tapng to ko citodongay a kanatal sanay a faloco ato demak i, o tadamaanay a tayal tosapilikec to hekal ato kanatal, o naitiniay i 1990 a mihecaan ami salingato tangasa i 2000 a mihecaan, o ninian i o tatangangay a longoc to saka laheci no demak i tini i Taywan, pakayniay toya 10 a mihecaan a misafilofilo, sanaw itiya a misalingato ami laheci to singkiw to a palowad to Lipo koing ato Kota taypiaw hananay, nga'ayay to ami palowad to teked a sa'po tora tang hananay ato pasadak to masamaamaanay a singpon, ato misalof to sapilikec to kanatal, ato pasadak tono kanatalay a singkiw, ono niyalo'ay a singkiw, ato tomok citodongay no Taywan, lomasato to sakakotaykotay ami likec to kanatal, ato pasadak to naitiniay i faloco' to tayal tosapi dipot to siyakay, ano o masamaamaanay to a tayal tosapalowad to siyakay i, nga'ayay to ami pahadak, saheto o damesayay onano nai foloco'ay a demak, sanaw oninian a demak i, mapahapinangay to itini i polong no kanatanatal, matoya sowal no singpon topi pasadak i kalokanatal i 2021 a mihecaan, o Taywan i o sakafalo to a ono niya to a kanatal sanay a sowal, mikikaka haca to 'ayaway a kanatal koka laheci to malo todongay a tada so'linay to a kanatal ko Taywan, miki'ayaw haca to i 'aya'ayaway to padaka a kanatal. O likisi no Taywan.ŚŹįÁĀ£ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Ono niyah finaweran tapang to ko Taywan.śįĎšłĽŚĆĖÁöĄŚŹįÁĀ£ Naitiniho i kaholaman, olanan a o ninah finaweran tapang kako kanatal sanay a halateng, naitini i tono padakaan ama pacomod to tani i Taywan, toya tala'ayaw no fodfod to 1895 a mihecaan, itini i Taywan 'aloman ko cifaloco'ay o mafana'ay a tamdaw to pakaylaay i o niyah finaweran tapang to kako kanatal Taywan sanay, I'ayaway to a mapalowad ko hatiniay a halateng ato faloco', o sakahatila nila i, pakaylaay to nano piihan nangla to pikowan no Dipong , itini i o niyah finaweran tapang to kako kanatal sanay a longoc ato faloco', o todongay to o pipalowad to kanatal no Taywan, o matayalay no siefo a tamdaw i o hatilaay to o nano misingkiwan ama tayal, itini a mapahapinang, nano 'ayaw ilaayto a lomengaw ko hatiniay a faloco' ato halateng tosaka palowadaw to o niyah finaweran tapang to a kanatal yasanay a demak, mikihatiyaay toya I'ayaway a Congwhamingkow i 16 amihecaan a lomuwad, sanaw ilaay a mapahapinang i ci^tangay to tilid ato sapakafana' a codad to "sa'ayaway to o niyah finaweran tapang to kako kanatal sanay itini i Yasiya " haiito caay ka awa ko hatiniay a faloco' ato halateng no i Yasiyaay a kanatal to sapipalowadaw to o niyah finaweran tapang to a kanatal sanay a napinapi:na a palowad, nikaolira o itiniay i Taywanay a cifaloco'ay a tamdaw ami palowad i, ilaay to ami sa'icel, dengan sa caay ka laheci.(Siwkolan 'Amis/Pangcah Suman 05/08'25) O tahapinangan a tilidŚŹÉŤÄÉŤ≥áśĖô:
S.PHON: == mara o~uno~u finaw…ôran tapaŇč tajwan ***** == o~u…¨~…ģ…ômak no~u finaw…ôran ato~u akat no~u tajwan:***** masamaanaj ko~u…¨~…ģ…ômak ato~u akat to~u pakaj…ĺaaj to~u ka…ĺa o~u finaw…ôran tapaŇč tajwan sanaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak , o~u…ĺanan a …¨~…ģ…ômak ato~u …ĺakat ni…ĺa i pakaj…ĺaaj to~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° no~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč finaw…ĺo~uan ato~u sakapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan a …¨~…ģ…ômak, naitini i °ajaw no~u **** a mińß…ô ¶aan a misa…ĺiŇčato~u, nano~u °ajaw ni…ĺa i, ja o~u ¶iwko~uko~u~u ko~umiŇčtaŇč ńßo~u ko~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj i, ¶aajaj ńßo~u ko~u o~u nińßaj a kanata…ĺ ko~u tajwan sanaj, nikao~u…ĺira, o~u…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u ńßatiniaj i, iraaj ko~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj a …ĺakat ato~u …¨~…ģ…ômak nira a pa…ĺa o~u nińßaj to~u a kanata…ĺ ko~u tajwan sanaj, pakajni to~ura pito~uo~u…ĺ to~u pa…ĺa o~u nija to~u ko~uninian a kanata…ĺ sanaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak ato~u taja…ĺ i, ¶aaj kao~u …ĺańßo~u…¨~…ģajaj, ano~u ¶aaj pakajni i no~u sakapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan ato~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u finaw…ô…ĺan a saka…ĺa ¶i ¶aj no~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° i, ¶aaj ka taŇčso~u…ĺ saan a ma…ĺańß…ô ¶i ko~u ńßatiniaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak, nawńßani nano~u °ajaw no~u mińß…ô ¶ańß…ô ¶a:an, itini i saka…ĺaj…ĺaj no~u …ĺikisi no~u tajwan, ¶aaj ka awaaj ko~u ńßatiniaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak to~u pakaj…ĺaaj to~u saka o~uno~u nija to~u a kanata…ĺ sanaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak, nano~u itini i **** a mińß…ô ¶aan ami sa…ĺiŇčato~u, tańßi…ĺa i pańß…ô…ĺ…ôk…ôn no~u ¶o~uŇčńßamiŇčko~u a °ajawaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak:**** ano~u °a…ĺaw…ôn nano~u °ajaw to~u **** a mińß…ô ¶aan ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak ato~u fo~u…¨~…ģfo~u…¨~…ģ to~u pakaj…ĺaaj i tajwan i, ¶aaj ka Ē ¶a iraaj to~u ko~u sapipa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģaw to~u saka …ĺakanata…ĺaw no~u tajwan, nanaj ma…ĺao~u nijańß finaw…ôran tapaŇč to~u a kanata…ĺ ko~u tajwan sanaj a …ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶, nikao~u…ĺira, ¶aajaj ka …ĺańß…ô ¶i, nawńßani ¶aajaj ńßo~u ka so~uŇčira ° ama …ĺa ¶i ¶aj ko~u nafa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °an no~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u finawo~uran, ano~u so~u °…ĺin…ôn a so~umo~uwa…ĺ i, o~u …ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ to~u pakaj…ĺaaj to~u saka…ĺa kanata…ĺaw no~u tajwan i, a…ĺat…ôk o~u sa °ajawaj a misa…ĺiŇčato~u i, naiti…ĺaajńßo~u i **** a mińß…ô ¶aan to~u ika…¨~…ģipo~uŇčan ńßo~u ami sa…ĺiŇčato~u to~ura ta ¶…ôŇč ńßananaj, o~u …ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ no~u finaw…ôran itija i, nanaj miki…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ to~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a mikińßatija ami …ĺik…ô ¶ to~u kanata…ĺ o~u sanaj, ato~u pipa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u sapi…ĺik…ô ¶ to~u kanata…ĺ a sa °o~upo~u, nikao~u…ĺira ¶aajaj ka pińßai ko~u…ĺa …¨~…ģipo~uŇč , ano~u ńßati…ĺati…ĺa ¶aaj ka pito~u…ĺas ami …ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ to~u saka …ĺa ¶…ô ¶ajaw ami…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u sa °o~upo~u to~u taja…ĺ to~upakaj…ĺaaj i po~u…ĺo~uŇč finawo~uran, taŇčasa sato~u **** a mińß…ô ¶aan, iraaj to~u ko~u sa °ajawaj a pisasiŇčkiw ńßananaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak. …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~usato~u i…ĺato~u ko~uja ńßo~u…ĺam a tajni i tajwan, to~u…ĺa ¶o~uŇčwńßamiŇčko~u ńßananaj tam…¨~…ģaw ami …ĺik…ô ¶ to~u ńß…ôka…ĺ, ńßato~u i…ĺato~u ko~u kaŇča °aj ami kińßatija ama taja…ĺ to~u sa °o~upo~u, nikao~u…ĺira ¶aaj ka matija to~u o~uno~unija to~u a kanata…ĺ sanaj …¨~…ģ…ômak, sanaw …ĺiko~u…ĺ sato~u i…ĺańßa ¶a ko~u…ĺa saka…ĺo~uw…ĺo~uw no~u ńß…ôka…ĺ to~u…ĺa *** ńßananaj a …¨~…ģ…ômakan, …ĺiko~u…ĺ sato~u ta…¨~…ģa ¶aaj sato~u ko~uka pi…ĺik…ô ¶ naŇča…ĺ to~u ńß…ôka…ĺ, sanaw a…¨~…ģińßaj sato~u ko~uka …ĺa…ĺaw…ĺaw no~u ńß…ôka…ĺ, o~ura ra ¶…ôn a …ĺaw…ĺaw , ¶o~uŇč…ĺi a …ĺaw…ĺaw , ¶awto~u a …ĺaw…ĺaw , mi…ĺitaw a …ĺaw…ĺaw , ato~u o~u…ĺa taŇčwaj ńßananaj a …¨~…ģ…ômmak no~u ńß…ôka…ĺ, …ĺiko~ur sato~u iraaj to~u ko~u pipa ¶a °o~uf no~u safo~u to~u …ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ no~u finawo~uran, taŇčasa to~u i **** a mińß…ô ¶aan itija sato~u a …¨~…ģo~u…¨~…ģo~usanaj a o~u nijańß finaw…ôran tapaŇč to~u a kanata…ĺ sanaj a …ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶, itijaaj to~u a so~u °…ĺin a ¶aaj to~u ka o~u Ē…¨~…ģ…ôŇčan to~u ¶…ô ¶ajaj a taŇč a ¶a ko~umi …ĺik…ô ¶aj to~u ńß…ôkka…ĺ, iraaj to~u ko~u…ĺo~uma a sa °o~upo~u ami kińßatija ami …ĺik…ô ¶ to~u ńß…ôka…ĺ kanata…ĺ. o~u sakańßatini no~u tajwan a o~u nijańß finaw…ôran tapŇč to~u ko~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj a kanata…ĺ sanaj a fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ato~u …¨~…ģ…ômak i, o~u ta…¨~…ģamaanaj a taja…ĺ to~usapi…ĺik…ô ¶ to~u tajwan, pakajniaj to~uja ** a mińß…ô ¶aan a misafi…ĺo~ufi…ĺo~u, sanaw itija a misa…ĺiŇčato~u ami …ĺańß…ô ¶i to~u siŇčkiw to~u a pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u …ĺipo~u ko~uiŇč ato~u ko~uta tajpiaw ńßananaj, Ňča °ajaj to~u ami pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u t…ôk…ô…¨~…ģ a sa °po~u to~ura taŇč ńßananaj ato~u pasa…¨~…ģak to~u masamaamaanaj a siŇčpo~un, ato~u misa…ĺo~uf to~u sapi…ĺik…ô ¶ to~u kanata…ĺ, ato~u pasa…¨~…ģak to~uno~u kanata…ĺaj a siŇčkiw, o~uno~u nija…ĺo~u °aj a siŇčkiw, ato~u to~umo~uk ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj no~u tajwan, …ĺo~umasato~u to~u sakako~utajko~utaj ami …ĺik…ô ¶ to~u kanata…ĺ, ato~u pasa…¨~…ģak to~u naitiniaj i fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° to~u taja…ĺ to~usapi …¨~…ģipo~ut to~u sijakaj, ano~u o~u masamaamaanaj to~u a taja…ĺ to~usapa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u sijakaj i, Ňča °ajaj to~u ami pańßa…¨~…ģak, sańß…ôto~u o~u …¨~…ģam…ôsajaj o~unano~u nai fo~u…ĺo~u ¶o~u °aj a …¨~…ģ…ômak, sanaw o~uninian a …¨~…ģ…ômak i, mapańßapinaŇčaj to~u itini i po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u kanatanata…ĺ, mato~uja so~uwa…ĺ no~u siŇčpo~un to~upi pasa…¨~…ģak i ka…ĺo~ukanata…ĺ i **** a mińß…ô ¶aan, o~u tajwan i o~u sakafa…ĺo~u to~u a o~uno~u nija to~u a kanata…ĺ sanaj a so~uwa…ĺ, mikikaka ńßa ¶a to~u °ajawaj a kanata…ĺ ko~uka …ĺańß…ô ¶i to~u ma…ĺo~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj a ta…¨~…ģa so~u °…ĺinaj to~u a kanata…ĺ ko~u tajwan, miki °ajaw ńßa ¶a to~u i °aja °ajawaj to~u pa…¨~…ģaka a kanata…ĺ. o~u …ĺikisi no~u tajwan.**** o~uno~u nijańß finaw…ôran tapaŇč to~u ko~u tajwan.****** naitinińßo~u i kańßo~u…ĺaman, o~u…ĺanan a o~u ninańß finaw…ôran tapaŇč kako~u kanata…ĺ sanaj a ńßa…ĺat…ôŇč, naitini i to~uno~u pa…¨~…ģakaan ama pa ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ to~u tani i tajwan, to~uja ta…ĺa °ajaw no~u fo~u…¨~…ģfo~u…¨~…ģ to~u **** a mińß…ô ¶aan, itini i tajwan °a…ĺo~uman ko~u ¶ifa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °aj o~u mafana °aj a tam…¨~…ģaw to~u pakaj…ĺaaj i o~u nijańß finaw…ôran tapaŇč to~u kako~u kanata…ĺ tajwan sanaj, i °ajawaj to~u a mapa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ ko~u ńßatiniaj a ńßa…ĺat…ôŇč ato~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °, o~u sakańßati…ĺa ni…ĺa i, pakaj…ĺaaj to~u nano~u piińßan naŇč…ĺa to~u piko~uwan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč , itini i o~u nijańß finaw…ôran tapaŇč to~u kako~u kanata…ĺ sanaj a …ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ ato~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °, o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj to~u o~u pipa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ to~u kanata…ĺ no~u tajwan, o~u mataja…ĺaj no~u si…ôfo~u a tam…¨~…ģaw i o~u ńßati…ĺaaj to~u o~u nano~u misiŇčkiwan ama taja…ĺ, itini a mapańßapinaŇč, nano~u °ajaw i…ĺaajto~u a …ĺo~um…ôŇčaw ko~u ńßatiniaj a fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ato~u ńßa…ĺat…ôŇč to~usaka pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģaw to~u o~u nijańß finaw…ôran tapaŇč to~u a kanata…ĺ jasanaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak, mikińßatijaaj to~uja i °ajawaj a ¶o~uŇčwńßamiŇčko~uw i ** amińß…ô ¶aan a …ĺo~umo~u~uwa…¨~…ģ, sanaw i…ĺaaj a mapańßapinaŇč i ¶i ĒtaŇčaj to~u ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ ato~u sapakafana ° a ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ to~u "sa °ajawaj to~u o~u nijańß finaw…ôran tapaŇč to~u kako~u kanata…ĺ sanaj itini i jasija " ńßaiito~u ¶aaj ka awa ko~u ńßatiniaj a fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ato~u ńßa…ĺat…ôŇč no~u i jasijaaj a kanata…ĺ to~u sapipa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģaw to~u o~u nijańß finaw…ôran tapaŇč to~u a kanata…ĺ sanaj a napinapi:na a pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ, nikao~u…ĺira o~u itiniaj i tajwanaj a ¶ifa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °aj a tam…¨~…ģaw ami pa…ĺo~uwa…¨~…ģ i, i…ĺaaj to~u ami sa °i ¶…ô…ĺ, …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan sa ¶aaj ka …ĺańß…ô ¶i.(siwko~u…ĺan °amis/paŇč ¶ańß so~u~uman **/** °**) o~u tańßapinaŇčan a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ****:
